title: Constraint
description: Recursive constraint tree used by the scheduler. Each node is tagged with a type discriminator. All time values are in Modified Julian Days (MJD).

constraint.description: Top-level schema for any node that implements Constraint.

start_mjd.description: Start time as Modified Julian Day (MJD).

end_mjd.description: End time as Modified Julian Day (MJD).

altitudeConstraint.description: Altitude range constraint. The evaluator computes the target's altitude at runtime using the telescope location — only the allowed range is stored.

min_deg.description: Minimum allowed altitude in degrees above the horizon.

max_deg.description: Maximum allowed altitude in degrees above the horizon.

azimuthConstraint.description: Azimuth range constraint. The evaluator computes the target's azimuth at runtime using the telescope location.

min_deg.description: Minimum azimuth in degrees measured from north through east.

max_deg.description: Maximum azimuth in degrees measured from north through east.

nighttimeConstraint.description: Astronomical nighttime constraint (Sun below −18°). Unit struct — no extra fields are stored; the observer location is provided by the telescope at evaluation time.

moonAltitudeConstraint.description: Moon altitude range constraint. The evaluator computes the Moon's altitude at runtime using the telescope location.

min_deg.description: Minimum Moon altitude in degrees (-90 to 90).

max_deg.description: Maximum Moon altitude in degrees (-90 to 90).

children.description: All child constraints must be satisfied (logical AND).
At least one child constraint must be satisfied (logical OR).

resourceConstraint.description: Resource constraint — restricts a task to eligible resources by ID and/or type. A resource matches if it appears in allowed_ids OR allowed_types (union semantics).

allowed_ids.description: If present, the task may only run on resources whose ID is in this list.

allowed_types.description: If present, the task may only run on resources whose type is in this list.

coalitionConstraint.description: Coalition constraint — requires minimum resources per type to be assigned simultaneously. Maps resource type names to minimum counts.

requirements.description: Map of resource type → minimum count required (e.g. {"T1": 2, "T2": 1}).
